nodes.name: Vegetable Soup & Bread — Lemon-Herb Bowl
nodes.description: name: Vegetable Soup & Bread — Lemon-Herb Bowl | short_description: Plant-based meal: vegetable soup, whole-grain bread, and a side salad—light, fiber-rich, and satisfying. | meal_suggestion: Boost pr
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Vegetable Soup & Bread — Lemon-Herb Bowl - name: Vegetable Soup & Bread — Lemon-Herb Bowl | short_description: Plant-based meal: vegetable soup, whole-grain bread, and a side salad—light, fiber-rich, and satisfying. | meal_suggestion: Boost protein by adding beans, lentils, or tofu to the soup or salad; use a low-sodium soup; drizzle the salad with olive oil and lemon for healthy fats. | nutrition_note: Fiber-rich and vitamin-packed with vegetables and whole-grain bread; protein is moderate; sodium varies by soup; opt for low-sodium soup for heart health.

nodes.name: Stuffed Bell Peppers — Mild-Spice Style
nodes.description: name: Stuffed Bell Peppers — Mild-Spice Style | short_description: Mild-spice style stuffed bell peppers filled with lean ground turkey, rice, tomato sauce, and cheddar. | meal_suggestion: Serve warm
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Stuffed Bell Peppers — Mild-Spice Style - name: Stuffed Bell Peppers — Mild-Spice Style | short_description: Mild-spice style stuffed bell peppers filled with lean ground turkey, rice, tomato sauce, and cheddar. | meal_suggestion: Serve warm as a complete meal. Pair with a side salad or steamed greens to boost fiber; substitute brown rice for more texture and nutrition; adjust cheese amount for a lighter or richer flavor. | nutrition_note: Lean ground turkey provides high-quality protein; rice supplies quick energy carbs; bell peppers add fiber and vitamin C. Cheddar adds calcium and flavor, contributing some saturated fat and sodium depending on cheese and sauce. For a lighter version, choose low-sodium tomato sauce and lean turkey.

nodes.name: Tofu Veggie Curry — Citrus Fresh Combo
nodes.description: name: Tofu Veggie Curry — Citrus Fresh Combo | short_description: Tofu and mixed vegetables in curry sauce over rice, a quick, plant-based curry meal with citrusy freshness. | meal_suggestion: For mor
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Tofu Veggie Curry — Citrus Fresh Combo - name: Tofu Veggie Curry — Citrus Fresh Combo | short_description: Tofu and mixed vegetables in curry sauce over rice, a quick, plant-based curry meal with citrusy freshness. | meal_suggestion: For more fiber, swap white rice for brown rice or serve with a side salad; add a squeeze of lemon or lime for extra citrus brightness. | nutrition_note: Plant-based protein from tofu, fiber from mixed vegetables, and carbohydrates from rice. The curry sauce adds flavor and sodium; consider portion control or choosing a low-sodium option if needed.
